name: Card Timer
description: Show a countdown target beside each review card to help pace study sessions.

uiEntries.label: Review timer
uiEntries.description: Show the configured pacing target during review.

settings.label: Card Timer
settings.description: Set review pacing and countdown behavior.
settings.helpText: When time runs out, the card stays open until you reveal and grade it.

controls.label: Enable Card Timer
controls.description: Show a countdown target beside each review card.

controls.label: Seconds per card
controls.description: Choose a target from 5 seconds to 5 minutes.
